user.title: Connect ADHDTasker
user.description: Generate a key in the web app: Manage → Inbound API, then paste it here.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-enter ADHDTasker API key
reauth_confirm.description: Your API key was rejected (it may have been regenerated). Paste the current key.

abort.already_configured: This ADHDTasker family is already set up.

data_description.scan_interval: How often to refresh the board (15–3600s).
data_description.secret: If set, incoming webhook events must carry this secret to be trusted.

add_task.name: Add task
add_task.description: Create a chore on the family board (points = onerousness × minutes × the family rate).

config_entry_id.name: Family
config_entry_id.description: Which ADHDTasker family (only needed with more than one).

assignee.name: Assignee
assignee.description: Profile name to assign it to (blank = anyone).

days.name: Days (WEEKLY)
days.description: For WEEKLY tasks, the weekday numbers, e.g. [1,2,3,4,5].

add_interrupt.name: Add interrupt
add_interrupt.description: Capture a quick zero-point interrupt note on the shared inbox.

claim_task.name: Claim task
claim_task.description: Mark a task in-progress, claimed by a profile.

task_id.name: Task ID
task_id.description: The task id. Provide this or a title.

task_title.name: Task title
task_title.description: Match by title instead of id.

complete_task.name: Complete task
complete_task.description: Mark a task done and award its points to a profile.

task_id.name: Task ID
task_id.description: The task id. Provide this or a title.

task_title.name: Task title
task_title.description: Match by title instead of id.

profile.name: Profile
profile.description: Who gets the points (blank = whoever claimed it).

approve_task.name: Approve task
approve_task.description: Approve a child's submitted task (marks it done + awards points) or a proposed task.

task_id.name: Task ID
task_id.description: The task id. Provide this or a title.

task_title.name: Task title
task_title.description: Match by title instead of id.

profile.name: Profile
profile.description: Who gets the points (blank = whoever claimed it).

ping.name: Ping family
ping.description: Send a push notification to the whole family or one profile.

profile.name: Profile
profile.description: Target one profile by name (blank = whole family).
